_comment: TRUE POSITIVE — SP-700020: MFA Push-Bombing / MFA Fatigue Attack
scenario: Attacker has valid credentials for a user and sends rapid MFA push requests to fatigue them into approving

events.properties.authenticationDetails[0].auth: MFA denied; user declined the request

events._note: 4th attempt succeeds — user approved out of fatigue

why_tp: First 3 rejected, 4th approved — classic fatigue pattern
Source IP is a known Tor exit node
analyst_action: Immediately revoke the user's active sessions
Contact the user to confirm whether they approved the MFA push
Reset credentials if user did not intentionally approve
Block source IP 185.220.101.45 in Conditional Access
